assertions.description: fetch() is exposed — the surface where local-network access restrictions are enforced.
navigator.permissions is exposed — the surface used to expose the local-network-access permission.
assertions.test: typeof navigator !== 'undefined' && typeof navigator.permissions === 'object' && typeof navigator.permissions.query === 'function'

assertions.description: Local Network Access only applies in secure contexts — isSecureContext is observable.
Request.mode defaults to 'cors' — Local Network Access piggy-backs on CORS preflight semantics.
A cross-origin fetch to a private/loopback IP from a public origin either errors (network/CORS) or is gated by permission. The script returns true if the call rejects or the page is itself loopback.
